statement.markdown: Given a sorted array of distinct integers, find the two elements whose sum is closest to zero. If there are multiple pairs with the same closest sum, return the pair with the smallest absolute values. If the array is empty, return an empty array.
statement.outputFormat: A pair of integers with the smallest absolute sum, or an empty array if input is empty
statement.notes: Note that the array is sorted in ascending order, and the integers are distinct.

constraints.description: The number of elements in the array
The absolute sum of the pair of integers
The sum of the pair of integers

examples.explanation: The pair with the smallest absolute sum is -2 and -3.
There is no pair with a negative sum.
The pair with the smallest absolute sum is -3 and -2.

hints.text: Sort the array and consider the two pointers approach

editorial.title: Array Index Sum
editorial.intuition: To find the pair with the smallest absolute sum, we can use a two-pointer approach. We initialize two pointers, one at the start and one at the end of the array. We then move the pointers towards each other based on the sum of the elements at the two pointers. If the sum is negative, we move the left pointer to the right to decrease the sum. If the sum is positive, we move the right pointer to the left to decrease the sum.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach: Try all possible pairs of elements in the array and keep track of the pair with the smallest absolute sum.
editorial.betterSolution: Two-pointer approach: Initialize two pointers at the start and end of the array and move them towards each other based on the sum of the elements at the two pointers.
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution: Use a two-pointer approach and keep track of the pair with the smallest absolute sum.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The two-pointer approach is correct because it ensures that we consider all possible pairs of elements in the array and return the pair with the smallest absolute sum.
commonMistakes: Not considering the case where the array is empty
